currentPayout(uint256).details: Returns 0 for non-existent or already-settled positions.

params.amount: Gross token amount deposited by trader (protocol fee deducted from this).
params.isLong: true = long (profit when price rises), false = short (profit when price falls).

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

LEVERAGE().notice: Position leverage multiplier. At 100x a 1% adverse move liquidates the position.

configManager().notice: Configuration store from which oracle, maxPayout, and maxUtilizationBps are read.

currentPayout(uint256).notice: Simulates settlement at the current oracle price and returns what the trader would receive.

liquidationPrice(uint256).notice: Returns the stored liquidation price for an open position.

openPosition(bool,uint256).notice: Open a long or short leveraged position.

pause().notice: Pause blocks openPosition; settle remains callable.

settle(uint256).notice: Settle a position at the current oracle price.         Only the trader or the keeper (owner) may call this.
